ValidationRule.description: ILV Position Package Type must match Package Record Type Name
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true , OR( AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="Time", ILVType__c != "Time" ) , AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="Expense", ILVType__c != "Expense" ) , AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="Time", ILVType__c != "Time" ) , AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="SupplierCosts", ILVType__c != "SupplierCosts" ) , AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="Group", ILVType__c != "Group" ) , AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="LicenseDirect", ILVType__c != "LicenseDirect" ) , AND( PackageName__r.RecordType.DeveloperName ="LicenseProvision", ILVType__c != "LicenseProvision" ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The invoice position Package Type Name does not match the Package Record Type Name. Please get in touch with your Super User. (ILV003)
